name: FS Bancorp, Inc.
summary: General FS Bancorp, a Washington corporation, was organized in September2011 for the purpose of becoming the holding company of 1st Security Bank upon the Banks conversion from a mutual to a stock savings bank (Conversion). The Conversion was completed on July9, 2012. At December 31, 2025, the Company had consolidated total assets of $3.2 billion, total loans receivable, net of $2.62 billion, totaldeposits of $2.67 billion, and total stockholders equity of $307.7 million.
